nasb.text: But the chief priests and the elders persuaded the crowds to ask for Barabbas and to put Jesus to death.

esv.text: Now the chief priests and the elders persuaded the crowd to ask for Barabbas and destroy Jesus.

cnv.text: 祭司長和長老慫恿群眾，叫他們去要求釋放巴拉巴，除掉耶穌。

ccb.text: 祭司长和长老却怂恿百姓要求释放巴拉巴，处死耶稣。

csbs.text: 祭司长们和长老们挑唆众人，叫他们要巴拉巴，而除灭耶稣。
